results.Query: Add new node with name new_EK_PORT_60 type EK_PORT, to ju1.s1.s2c8. Return a graph.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-1, add
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
    # Add the new PORT node
    graph_copy.add_node(
        "new_EK_PORT_60",
        name="new_EK_PORT_60",
        type=["EK_PORT"]
    )
    # Connect it under the specified parent using RK_CONTAINS edge
    if graph_copy.has_node("ju1.s1.s2c8"):
        graph_copy.add_edge(
            "ju1.s1.s2c8",
            "new_EK_PORT_60",
            type="RK_CONTAINS"
        )
    # Convert the updated graph to JSON‑link format
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    # Prepare the return object
    return {
        "type": "graph",
        "data": graph_json,
        "updated_graph": graph_json
    )
